name: GetProductByName
description: Retrieve product information by product name.

product_name.description: The name of the product to look up.

name: GetProductById
description: Retrieve product information by product ID.

product_id.description: The unique ID of the product.

name: GetInvoice
description: Fetch invoice details using the invoice number.

invoice_number.description: The number associated with the invoice.

name: GetInvoicesByCustomer
description: Retrieve all invoices associated with a customer ID.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer whose invoices should be fetched.

name: GetGustomerPO
description: Retrieves the Purchase Order (PO) for a customer based on the PO number they provided

po_number.description: The Purchase Order (PO) number that should be fetched.
